ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gas_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the gas station is located */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the gas station */,
  "octane" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gas station */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the gas station */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the gas station */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the station's data was last updated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the gas station is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the gas station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the gas station's location */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the location data */,
  "accuracy_type" TEXT /* Type of accuracy for the location data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the location data */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the gas station */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the gas station is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the gas station is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the gas station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of gas station */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the gas station */,
  "geofence" TEXT /* Geofence data for the gas station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_stations_accuracy_type FOREIGN KEY ("accuracy_type") REFERENCES accuracy_types ("accuracy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_stations_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_stations_octane FOREIGN KEY ("octane") REFERENCES fuels ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_stations_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuels" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  "octane" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_types" (
  "accuracy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy type */,
  "accuracy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the accuracy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accuracy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas station being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_updates_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES gas_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager's ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas station being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES gas_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_details" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas station the unit is associated with */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Number of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_details_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES gas_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_numbers" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas station the phone number is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_numbers_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES gas_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas station the contact is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES gas_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "location_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location history event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas station with the updated location */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the updated location */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES gas_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas station the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES gas_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
